response.justification: Excellent fit with 13+ years of full-stack development, strong alignment with primary technical stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), and current direct experience building AI agent infrastructure. Demonstrated mastery of testing practices and architectural thinking across multiple senior roles. Minor gaps around Nest.js and Vitest specificity are easily addressable given proven Node.js and testing expertise.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience across frontend (React), backend (Node.js/TypeScript), and databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Current role directly involves AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling with relevant tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, MCP frameworks)
Demonstrated commitment to code quality, testing practices (TDD), and architectural thinking across multiple senior/staff roles with measurable impact
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js experience across many roles
Vitest not called out specifically, though testing expertise and TDD background are strong
Python not listed in skills despite being listed as required language

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience alignment with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Current role in AI agent infrastructure and MCP development
Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Python specificity
